message.body: this speedrunner has been playing GTA for over five hours when one of the strangest things happened. This is Joshimuz, and he just realized that he accidentally turned on a cheat code that would completely invalidate his run after five hours of playing. Joshimuz was playing GTA San Andreas on the PC and normally to load in cheats, you simply type out a word on the keyboard
